name: Polymarket LLM Analyst
description: AI-driven prediction market trading agent that uses an LLM to analyze market questions and place bets based on confidence scores
author: holonym-foundation

envVars.description: Maximum USD value per order (hard cap enforced by the agent)
LLM provider for market analysis. Supported values: anthropic, openai
API key for the configured LLM provider
Minimum confidence score (0-1) required to place a bet. Markets below this threshold are skipped.
Milliseconds to wait between LLM API calls for rate limiting
Polymarket CLOB L2 auth -- API key. Mint via clob-client deriveApiKey() or POST /auth/derive-api-key. Required for order submission; not needed for read-only market polling.
Polymarket CLOB L2 auth -- API key passphrase. Returned alongside POLY_API_KEY at derivation time.
Polymarket CLOB L2 auth -- API key secret used to compute the HMAC for the POLY_SIGNATURE header. Returned alongside POLY_API_KEY at derivation time.
Polymarket CLOB L2 auth -- wallet address tied to the API key. Defaults to waap-cli whoami evmWalletAddress when omitted.
